entities.boy: a boy standing in the treehouse

scenes.title: The Treehouse
scenes.background_prompt: A backyard with a large oak tree, a wooden treehouse built among the branches, a rope ladder hanging down, and a lawn below with scattered leaves. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A backyard on a breezy afternoon. A wooden treehouse is built among the thick branches of a large oak tree, about three meters above the ground. A boy of about nine in a red t-shirt and khaki shorts stands firmly on the treehouse platform, both hands gripping the wooden railing, looking down at the ground below with a proud grin. His feet are planted solidly on the wooden planks of the platform. A rope ladder with wooden rungs hangs from the platform down to the grass, swaying slightly in the wind. Scattered orange and yellow leaves cover the lawn below. The treehouse has a small window cut into one wall, and a hand-painted sign reading 'KEEP OUT' is nailed above the entrance. A bicycle lies on its side in the grass near the base of the tree.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place boy on the treehouse platform (up in the tree), standing with both hands gripping the wooden railing, looking down with a proud grin. Feet planted solidly on the wooden planks.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom-left foreground, a lush green meadow is filled with small pink and white flowers, three-leaf clovers, and scattered brown leaves. Moving toward the center, the thick, gnarled roots of a large tree emerge from the grassy ground, surrounded by more clovers and fallen leaves. In the bottom-right foreground, taller stalks with orange-brown leaves stand next to small blue and white flowers. Dominating the midground is a massive tree with a thick, textured brown trunk that splits into several large branches supporting a dense canopy of green and yellowish-green leaves. Built into the branches on the left side of the tree is a wooden treehouse made of brown planks with a pitched roof and a small square window. A wooden platform extends from the treehouse, bordered by a railing made of wooden posts and thick rope. On this platform, a young boy with short brown hair, wearing a red and white striped shirt, blue overalls, and yellow shoes, stands smiling and looking downward. Attached to the edge of the platform and hanging vertically toward the ground is a rope ladder with wooden rungs. In the background, soft green rolling hills sit beneath a bright blue sky filled with several large, fluffy white clouds, indicating a clear, sunny day.
